NAVAREA XIX 34/211. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 041830 UTC APR 21NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.72-26.4N 020-08.2E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
NOTES: A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N. REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 32/21
